title: Canada child benefit (CCB) and the child disability benefit (CDB) payment amounts (base years 2021-2023) - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada child benefit (CCB) and the child disability benefit (CDB) payment amounts (base years 2021-2023)
Canada child benefit (CCB) payment amounts
CCB payment amounts for base year 2023
CCB payment amounts for base year 2022
CCB payment amounts for base year 2021
The CCB reduction is based on income as follows (lower incomes):
Reduction amount for income greater than $36,502 up to $79,087 for base year 2023
Reduction amount for income greater than $34,863 up to $75,537 for base year 2022
Reduction amount for income greater than $32,797 up to $71,060 for base year 2021
The CCB reduction is based on income as follows (higher incomes):
Reduction amount for income greater than $79,087 for base year 2023
Reduction amount for income greater than $75,537 for base year 2022
Reduction amount for income greater than $71,060 for base year 2021

## Child disability benefit (CDB) payment amounts
Child disability benefit (CDB) payment amounts for each eligible child
CDB payment amounts for base year 2023
CDB payment amounts for base year 2022
CDB payment amounts for base year 2021
The CDB reduction is based on income as follows:
Number of children with disability
Reduction amount for income greater than $79,087 for base year 2023
Reduction amount for income greater than $75,537 for base year 2022
Reduction amount for income greater than $71,060 for base year 2021
